race.comment: LAWRENNY BOYS (4) deserves another win. Doesn't score out of turn but has a super consistent record at this track and placed 3/4 course and distance. Speedy type who will take catching. GEEGEES MERCEDES (8) got home hard fresh to score the maiden win here. Has upside and looks hard to hold out again. BENEFITSOFMINE (1) last appeared five-and-a-half weeks ago over 1462m at Kilmore when he finished sixth. This is his first run for the Kelvin Hamilton stable. Looks a key chance expected to feature. BELLA CHINKARA (7) has a strong record course and distance and looks all set for a positive return. LADY FERN (13) was thereabouts last time and on best figures can sneak into the finish.
